description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/transport.json to add the dangling dependency id 'R3TR DTEL ZINVOICE_STATUS' to the objects array. check_transport.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_transport.py: 1 dangling dependency — 'R3TR DTEL ZINVOICE_STATUS' is listed in dependencies but not carried in objects. Adding it to objects so the request actually ships what it depends on. Not touching the checker.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_transport.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
